title: CognitiveRecommendationDescriptor
description: Schema for the output of tools/cognition_recommend.ts. Combines a snapshot of cognitive field signals across substrates with a ranked list of recommended actions.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC time of when this recommendation set was generated.

basis.description: Sources of authority for this recommendation: which scanner produced it, which contract specifies its format, what git state was observed.

scanner.description: Path to the scanner script (typically tools/scanner_core.ts).

contract.description: Path to the contract this recommendation conforms to.

git_status.description: Indicator of git state at time of generation, e.g. 'observed', 'clean', 'dirty'.

signals.description: Per-substrate signal field: counts of artifacts at each level (L1..L8) of coverage, distribution across cognitive phases.

L3_schema_valid.description: Files whose frontmatter conforms to expected schema.

L4a_hash_claimed.description: Files that claim a content hash.

L4b_hash_verified.description: Files whose claimed hash matches actual content.

L8_published.description: Files published to a public surface.

phases.description: Distribution of artifacts across cognitive phases (per THOUGHT_PHASES.v0.1).

dirtyLines.description: Output of `git status --porcelain` lines relevant to this substrate.

recommendations.description: Ranked list of recommended next actions, highest-pressure first.

vector.description: Short slug categorizing the kind of work this recommends.

phase_from.description: Cognitive phase the substrate is currently in (per THOUGHT_PHASES.v0.1).

phase_to.description: Cognitive phase this recommendation would move the substrate into.

rank.description: Position in the sorted list (1 = highest priority).

action.description: Human-readable description of the recommended next action.

rationale.description: Why this action matters, given the current substrate state.

expected_receipt.description: What would constitute a successful completion of this action — a description of the receipt that would prove the work was done.

commands.description: Suggested shell commands to perform this action.
